name: patient_mrn_present
expression: patient_mrn IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(patient_mrn)) > 0
description: MRN is required to attach results to the right patient chart and downstream FHIR DiagnosticReport resource.

name: lab_clia_number_format
expression: lab_clia_number IS NULL OR lab_clia_number REGEXP '^[0-9]{2}D[0-9]{7}$'
description: CLIA certificate numbers should follow the standard two digits, D, seven digits format.

name: test_results_not_empty
description: A laboratory report without test result rows cannot support clinical review or quality reporting.

name: overall_status_valid
description: Report status must be one of the supported HL7/FHIR diagnostic report states.

name: avg_confidence_minimum
description: Low average confidence on lab reports can misstate critical values and must be routed to review.
